channel.title: ICYMI Law — News-like Link Feed
channel.description: Popular news-like links shared recently by legal-type folks.

item.title: US Decides Against Renewing USMCA, Shifting to Rolling Talks
item.description:
The US won’t renew its trade deal with Canada and Mexico, choosing instead to conduct annual reviews of the pact in a decision that risks adding uncertainty for companies producing goods across North ...

item.title: What to know if you go to Trump’s potentially record-breaking fireworks show
item.description:
The America 250 fireworks are expected to start later than normal on an unusually hot day. Here’s what to know if you plan to watch from the National Mall on July Fourth.

item.title: Starmer’s goodbye gift to Britain: a US pharma deal that could be more lethal than Covid | Aditya Chakrabortty
item.description:

item.title: How Phones Alerted Millions Before Quakes Shook Venezuela (Gift Article)
item.description:
